title: Single-cell RNA sequencing analysis of fallopian tube and high-grade serous ovarian cancer microenvironment
author: Joshua Brand
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: scRNA-Seq analysis of benign fallopian tube samples was used to identify similar cell types in high-grade serous ovarian cancers and relevant tissues. Analysis includes differential gene expression, gene set enrichment analysis, gene regulatory network analysis, cell-cell interaction analysis, and use of TCGA.
steps_raw: scRNA-Seq analysis of benign fallopian tube samples was used to identify similar cell types in high-grade serous ovarian cancers and relevant tissues. Analysis includes differential gene expression, gene set enrichment analysis, gene regulatory network analysis, cell-cell interaction analysis, and use of TCGA.
